summary_sections.title: Key Concepts: Rational Exponents

a^(1/2) = ‚àöa, a^(1/3) = ‚àõa, a^(2/3) = (‚àõa)¬≤ = ‚àõ(a¬≤).

Laws of exponents apply to rational exponents: a·µê ¬∑ a‚Åø = a^(m+n), (a·µê)‚Åø = a^(mn), etc.
